name: Mackerel and Tomato
steps: Leave covered in salt for 20 minutes. Rinse and dry.
Using tweezers, remove the bones and season fillets with black pepper.
Remove skin from the tomatoes and store in fridge skin side up.
Once cooked, remove and cook in the oven at 250C for 10 minutes.
Remove fillets and cook in the oven at 250C for 6 minutes.

finishing_and_plating: Warm fillets in the holding oven.
Place fillets of the mackerel on the eye gazpacho.
Top with tomato and spoon of ricotta cheese.
